info.title: Sfumato: The lean, modern, utility-based SCSS/CSS framework generation tool
info.description: Version 5.2.8 for Linux (.NET 9.0.14/X64) / Dart Sass 1.82.0 / 22,725 Utility Classes

options.name: --path
options.description:
: Follow with a relative or absolute path to/for your sfumato.yml
settings file (e.g. `sfumato-scss watch --path Code/MyProject`)

options.name: --minify
options.description: : Minify CSS output; use with build and watch commands
